papers.title: Single-cell atlas reveals root cell-state transitions under drought stress
papers.abstract: A single-cell transcriptomic study maps how root tissues alter hormone signaling, cell wall remodeling, and stress-response programs during progressive drought.

papers.title: A domestication allele improves nitrogen-use efficiency in modern rice
papers.abstract: Genetic analysis links a selected rice allele to stronger nitrogen uptake, improved yield stability, and altered root architecture across field environments.

papers.title: Forest carbon sinks weaken after repeated heat and water stress events
papers.abstract: Long-term ecosystem monitoring indicates that compound climate extremes reduce photosynthetic recovery and reshape species contributions to carbon storage.

papers.title: Rhizosphere microbiome assembly protects plants from soil-borne pathogens
papers.abstract: Synthetic community experiments identify microbial consortia that suppress pathogen growth and activate host immune priming in roots.

papers.title: Spatial metabolomics identifies defense gradients in infected leaves
papers.abstract: A spatial metabolomics workflow resolves leaf defense chemistry at tissue scale and links metabolite gradients to pathogen invasion fronts.
